subject: [PATCH 6/8] nfsd: fix refcount leak in nfsd_file_lru_add on insertion failure

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes a latent bug in the NFS server that causes a reference count leak when inserting an nfsd_file into the LRU fails. The leak occurs because the reference count is incremented but never decremented, causing the file cache entry to be retained indefinitely. The patch adds a compensating refcount decrement on failure and changes the WARN_ON condition to prevent log flooding. Additionally, it returns early on failure to avoid unnecessary calls to nfsd_file_schedule_laundrette().
